PF2E-FLATFINDER.Settings.CompetenceBadge: Show a Flatfinder competence band on roll cards. Lore skills gain one band; a natural 20/1 shifts the band up/down by one.
Replace PF2e's native incapacitation degree-of-success change with the Flatfinder rule: an untyped bonus to the save equal to twice the level difference (max +10) when the target outlevels the source (spells count as twice their rank).
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Settings.FlattenDc.Name: Flatten item & inline DCs
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Settings.FlattenDc.Hint: Subtract the source item's level from static DCs that the system doesn't flatten automatically: inline @Check[...|dc:N] DCs written into descriptions and fixed save DCs carried by items/spells. DCs derived from a creature's statistics are left to pf2e-flatten, so the two never stack.
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Settings.EncounterBudget: Show the Flatfinder (Proficiency-without-Level) encounter XP total and difficulty band at the top of the combat tracker.
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Settings.ApexTurns.Name: Apex solo-boss extra turns
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Settings.ApexTurns.Hint: Automatically insert the extra turns of an NPC flagged as Apex (via the crown button on its sheet) into standard initiative, at (rolled initiative − 10), (− 20), and so on. The Prime turn is badged in the tracker. Stands down automatically while gluniverse-initiative's Card mode is active, since that mode handles multi-turn bosses itself.
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Settings.ApexPerTurnGuar: Resolve per-turn effects (persistent damage, frightened and other start/end-of-turn ticks, turn-based effect expiry) only on an Apex boss's Prime turn, never on its extra turns — as Flatfinder §8 requires. Disable if it conflicts with another module that drives turn processing.
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Settings.ApexPhases.Name: Apex: HP-phase beats
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Settings.ApexPhases.Hint: Whisper a reminder to the GM when an Apex boss crosses 66% and 33% of its HP: take a free turn, shed one condition, and shift tactics (Flatfinder §8, Component 4).
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Apex.Dialog.Title: Apex Template — {name}
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Apex.Dialog.Hint: Flatfinder's Apex (solo boss) template gives a lone boss extra full turns instead of bigger numbers. The boss takes its Prime turn, then an additional turn at (rolled initiative − 10) per extra turn. Each extra turn resets its Multiple Attack Penalty; per-turn effects only resolve on the Prime turn.
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Apex.Dialog.Enabled: Treat this NPC as an Apex solo boss
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Apex.Dialog.TurnsHint: Total turns the boss takes each round (2 by default; 3 is suggested against a 5–6 PC party).
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Apex.Tag.PrimeTooltip: Prime turn: per-turn effects (persistent damage, frightened, start/end-of-turn triggers) resolve only here.
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Apex.Tag.ExtraTooltip: Extra Apex turn: a fresh turn with a reset Multiple Attack Penalty. Per-turn effects do NOT resolve on this turn.
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Apex.Phase.FreeTurn: Take an immediate turn out of initiative.
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Apex.Phase.ShedCondition: End one condition affecting the boss.
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Apex.Phase.Tactics: Shift tactics — fire the per-phase ability.
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Apex.Counteract.Note: Counteract rank {rank} (creature level {level}, used in full). Compare this check to the effect's DC for the degree of success, then counteract up to:
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Apex.Counteract.Foot: An effect's counteract rank is its spell rank, or half its level rounded up. The boss must have suffered the condition for a full turn; once per turn, as an action.
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Apex.Counteract.NoSave: Flatfinder: could not read this creature's saving-throw modifiers for an Apex counteract.
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Apex.Sheet.Tooltip: This NPC is a Flatfinder Apex solo boss. It takes extra full turns each round; configure it with the crown button in the sheet's titlebar.
Treat an Elite or Weak creature (native button or the bundled FF effects) as +/-2 levels in the encounter-XP and incapacitation math, as Flatfinder requires. This does not change the creature's sheet, so it stays compatible with pf2e-flatten.
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Competence.Caption: Competence
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Incapacitation.Caption: Incapacitation
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Incapacitation.Tooltip: Target is {diff} level(s) above the source (target {target} vs source {source}); Flatfinder grants an untyped +{bonus} to the save (twice the level difference, max +10).
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Encounter.Title: Flatfinder XP
PF2E-FLATFINDER.Encounter.Tooltip.Budget: Budgets — Trivial {trivial} / Low {low} / Moderate {moderate} / Severe {severe} / Extreme {extreme}
